entries.title: GA4 Event Firing Reliability Checker
entries.notes: Captures GA4 events fired in-page via content script and validates against declared triggers. Detects duplicate gtag/GTM conflicts common in 2026 due to consent-mode updates. Free tier covers 1 site; paid for multi-property.
entries.pain: GA4 events fail silently when gtag conflicts with GTM, leaving marketing teams with broken attribution they don't notice for weeks.

entries.title: Webflow CMS Field Usage Heatmap
entries.notes: Scrapes Webflow designer DOM to map which CMS fields each component references; highlights orphan fields in collection view. Buildable in 2 weeks. Webflow's user base grew 40% YoY with no usage analytics tool.
entries.pain: Webflow CMS collections accumulate unused fields after redesigns, bloating API responses and confusing editors who don't know what's safe to delete.

entries.title: Linear Issue Cycle Time Estimator
entries.notes: Sidebar widget reads Linear GraphQL API and projects completion date per issue from team's trailing 30-day cycle time. Local-first; SaaS bridge for multi-team rollups. Linear lacks native predictive analytics and is API-rich.
entries.pain: Engineering leads need early warning when a Linear issue is at risk of slipping its target, but the UI hides this until status changes.

entries.title: Stripe Subscription Metering Drift Detector
entries.notes: Captures Stripe metered usage events via webhook replay and diffs against dashboard-reported totals. Free tier allows 100 events/mo for hobby projects. Usage-based billing market grew 60% YoY with no consumer-grade audit tool.
entries.pain: Usage-based billing meters drift between server-recorded and Stripe-reported values, causing invisible revenue leakage until audit.

entries.title: Chrome Profile Cookie Wall
entries.notes: Forces per-profile cookie partitioning for sites that share storage and surfaces a visual audit of cross-profile leaks. Pure client-side; no SaaS needed. Regulatory pressure on cross-context tracking (EU DSA, CA) drives consumer demand.
entries.pain: Chrome profiles still share cookies and local storage through Chrome Sync, letting one account's session leak into another silently.

entries.title: Vercel Edge Function Cold Start Visualizer
entries.notes: Pulls Vercel API logs and renders a geographic heatmap of cold-start latency by region and function. Buildable in 2 weeks. Vercel's edge runtime expanded to 20+ regions in 2026; no extension covers this yet.
entries.pain: Vercel edge function cold starts are buried in dashboard logs without per-region breakdowns, making optimization guesswork.

entries.title: Mixpanel Event Schema Drift Overlay
entries.notes: Captures Mixpanel events in-page and compares to declared schema in Mixpanel Lexicon, flagging drift by severity. Quota-based pricing aligned with event volume. Mixpanel released Lexicon but no browser-side validator exists.
entries.pain: Mixpanel events arrive with new properties or types that break downstream dashboards but nobody notices for weeks.

entries.title: HubSpot Deal Stage Aging Alert
entries.notes: Browser notifications and sidebar widget on HubSpot CRM pages when deals cross configurable age thresholds per stage. Per-seat for sales managers. HubSpot's own deal aging is buried in workflows; reps want passive alerts.
entries.pain: HubSpot deal stages quietly age past sales SLA thresholds and reps only notice during weekly pipeline reviews.

entries.title: Google Docs Suggestion Diff Tracker
entries.notes: Adds a side panel grouping suggestions by author/section with auto-generated rationale summaries via local LLM. Free for personal use; paid for team workspaces. Google Docs suggestion mode adoption jumped with remote work.
entries.pain: Suggestion-mode edits in Google Docs are hard to summarize for reviewers; checking 200 suggestions takes hours.

entries.title: Conference Talk Recording Topic Indexer
entries.notes: Side panel on YouTube conference videos generates a clickable topic timeline from auto-generated captions. Pure client-side processing. Conferences like Strange Loop and JSConf host 50+ hours of unsearched video each.
entries.pain: Long conference talk recordings are unsearchable; viewers scrub for 10 minutes to find the relevant 30 seconds.

entries.title: API Mock Server Quick Launcher
entries.notes: Sidebar reads OpenAPI specs from the current page and launches a hosted mock server via extension's backend. SaaS bridge to per-seat for teams. Existing mock tools (Prism, Mockoon) require leaving the browser.
entries.pain: Spinning up a mock server requires leaving the browser, opening a terminal, and configuring OpenAPI every time.

entries.title: Pipeline Deal Email Reply Time Predictor
entries.notes: Sidebar widget on Gmail/Outlook for sales reps predicts reply probability by sender reply-history pattern, throttling follow-ups. Per-seat for sales managers. Existing reply-time tools are generic email, not deal-aware.
entries.pain: Sales reps can't predict when prospects will reply, so they send redundant follow-ups that hurt reply rates and burn leads.

entries.title: Sales Enablement Asset Usage Tracker
entries.notes: Tracks which sales enablement assets (decks, case studies, one-pagers) get opened/downloaded from HubSpot and reports usage. Per-seat for enablement managers. Sales enablement is a $5B market with thin browser tooling.
entries.pain: Sales enablement teams don't know which decks and one-pagers reps actually use, so they keep producing the wrong assets.

entries.title: Outlook Email Delay Predictor
entries.notes: Scores Outlook threads by sender response-history patterns and labels 'likely delayed' to reduce redundant follow-ups. Pure client-side heuristics; tip-jar monetization. Outlook market underserved by Gmail-focused extensions.
entries.pain: Outlook users can't tell whether an unanswered thread is forgotten or simply delayed, so they re-send unnecessarily.

entries.title: Local AI Document Citation Checker
entries.notes: Local LLM sidebar on documents highlights any sentence containing a citation and verifies the reference actually appears in the source. Freemium for 100 pages/mo. Hallucinated citations are AI's top trust problem in 2026.
entries.pain: Local AI summarizers hallucinate citations that don't exist in the source document, eroding trust in the output.
